abort.already_configured: This infrared transmitter is already configured as a Pronto IR Sender.
abort.no_emitters: No infrared transmitter entities found. Please set up an infrared emitter integration first (e.g., ESPHome or Broadlink).

data_description.infrared_entity_id: The infrared transmitter entity that will physically send the IR signals.

user.description: Select the infrared transmitter entity to use when sending Pronto IR codes.
user.title: Set up Pronto IR Sender

invalid_pronto_code.message: Invalid Pronto code: {code}. Expected a space-separated list of hex words starting with '0000'.

unsupported_pronto_type.message: Unsupported Pronto type {type} in code: {code}. Only raw Pronto codes (type 0000) are supported.
